cooperates.cooperate_desc: Actually all tanks are a match for terizla just pray it's a good player using them

counters.counter_desc: You've gotta be careful if you're facing yuzhong because of the life draining passive it has and that same passive would heal the enemy yuzhong off your hp, and the first skill of yuzhong already deals enough damage to ******** early in the match or slowly drain you with yuzhong's second skill. But you can outplay yuzhong you just gotta be patient

Hell if you faced benedetta in the exp lane you gotta pray that your enemy is not good at using that hero because he/she would give you a stressful match trying to catch him/her and the hero can early invade your jungler's blue buff giving your team at a disadvantage if your jungler fails to get the buff

dominants.dominant_desc: For this trick is to upgrade second skill first because i have to make terizla dominant in the early game by poking the enemy with certain damage until the enemy backs away to the turret i also do this with the both enemy and minions if the enemy you're facing off against the exp lane prioritizes minions it would be a 50/50 that you can kill them early or not but if you managed to kill them immediately go after the shield's turret because each hit would give gold for faster item building so i can freeze the lane but also be careful on approaching the bushes because once you see the enemy seems a little too confident even if their hp is low or halved, you will know they're trying to bait you so move a bit far from the bush while keeping the distance you will get from the minions's xp and gold or be lucky enough that they're just cocky and no one's in the bush would guarantee you a kill with the flicker and skill ready in your hand.

If you've managed to get your team the dominant side by atleast 2-3 turtles slain by your jungler you can now focus both on your lane and midlane but don't go too far because it would destroy your turret in your lane giving the enemy 100+ gold for each turret destroyed or if you fail then you have to prioritize on being the dominant hero yourself so you can get your teammates to farm freely and gaining the upper hand while fending off the enemies

Now in the endgame if your team has the upperhand this is where you can end the game with certain towers dives by using terizla's third skill on enemies that is still weak inside the towers and finishing them off and winning the game if the enemy fails to improvise but each tower dive needs to be calculated and teammates nearby to help you slain the enemies inside the turrets. And for the losing side this is full on strategize mode, wait until their damage dealer is vulnerable that is when you can kill the damage dealer off by using the surprise combo with your teammates helping you or not it's 50/50 because mostly damage dealers relies on stun that would make them escape from you and make their teammates take care of you, penetration that would melt tanky heroes, and crits and damage that would make the damage dealer in your team loss an advantage if the enemy damage dealer manages to build faster it would be at your team's disadvantage or if the enemies prioritizes on killing your damage dealers early in the game it would be an early mistake if your teammates fail to protect them because you need to maintain your dominance and cannot let go of your lane in the early game for the turtle fight just only you can let go of your lane if you managed to destroy the turret or if the turtle is on the marksman's lane that you can visit mid and turtle on the gold lane but it's also optional to stay a bit in the gold lane if their enemy fighter is somewhere else and your minions moving freely in your lane.

emblems.emblem_desc: This is my emblem for terizla it's very useful in clashes maintaining both damage and return hp each skill

equips.equip_desc: This is my overall build based on the recent pickings of my enemies most of the time. You can change athena shield and immortality based on the enemy you're facing

This is my build before buying immortality or antique cuirass as my last build before selling fury hammer, the reason for the early fury hammer is to get surprising amount of damage even in the early game to scare off enemies even their jungler as soon as they see how much damage you deal would make them back away in the turtle fight

So it's very useful if you have quick reflexes in the battlefield or you can use the sprint spell if you want to go full on clash against enemies and escape with 50/50 chances

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set is the best choice for Terizla because it gives him extra sustain and damage in the EXP lane. The additional HP, HP Regen, and Adaptive Attack allow him to trade effectively with opponents, while the lifesteal from Festival of Blood makes his skills harder to punish. With this setup, Terizla can stay longer in lane, clear waves safely, and become a reliable frontliner in teamfights.
emblems.emblem_title: Fighter Emblem Festival of Blood Sustain

equips.equip_desc: This build focuses on sustain, durability, and teamfight impact. With this setup, Terizla becomes a strong initiator who can absorb damage, control enemies with his ultimate, and stay alive long enough for his team to secure victory.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker gives Terizla the mobility he lacks. It can be used to escape or engage, but the best use is to combine it with his Ultimate (Penalty Zone) to catch enemies off guard and set up a winning teamfight.

hero.hero_overview: Terizla has good second skill damage and balanced sustainability. Terizla can sustain and dish out damage in war but he's a skill based hero, which means he needs faster skill cooldown to perform in wars.
hero.hero_strength: Terizla is strong in early game if you understand how his skill 1 passive and item management. Yes, Terizla really rely on items to perform efficiently.
hero.hero_weakness: His health is not too durable in early game, you need to keep a good distance from the enemy.

spell.spell_desc: I really recommend Flicker cause it can help Terizla to initiate war and even dodge an enemy. Terizla can open wars with Flicker and his ultimate combo

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal is the ultimate frontline partner for Terizla, offering massive crowd control and perfect setup for devastating combos. With his Sacred Hammer and Implosion, Tigreal can clump multiple enemies together, making them sitting ducks for Terizlas Penalty Zone and Execution Strike. Tigreals tankiness also allows him to absorb the initial burst and protect Terizla while he channels his abilities. This combo excels in coordinated team fights—Tigreal initiates, Terizla follows up with heavy AoE damage, and enemies get wiped out before they can react. Together, they are a team fight nightmare.

counters.counter_desc: Valir can easily stop Terizla in his tracks using his fiery arsenal of knockback, slow, and stun debuffs. Moreover, he boasts of a built-in Purify through his Vengeance Flame, which also enhances his other skills. If he lunges at you with his Penalty Zone, quickly cast Vengeance Flame and push him back with Searing Torrent. To trigger Ashings stun effect, continuously hit him with Burst Fireball.

dominants.dominant_desc: During the laning phase, pressure your enemy by hitting them with Revenge Strike, followed quickly by Execution Strike. By doing this combo, you will inflict significant damage from the explosion of Revenge Strike. However, if your opponent is too mobile, you can slow them down first with the first cast of Execution Strike before targeting them with Revenge Strike. Proceed by hitting them with the last two casts of your second skill. If you need to hold your target down right away, trigger Penalty Zone before hitting them with Revenge Strike and Execution Strike. Additionally, you can perform the Flicker-Penalty Zone combo to extend the cast range of your ultimate and surprise your enemies.

emblems.emblem_desc: As Terizla, selecting the Fighter emblem gives you a combination of sustainability and damage. It provides substantial Spell Vamp, Adaptive Attack, and Hybrid Defense. Take Thrill in the first tier to acquire additional Adaptive Attack, and Festival of Blood to further amplify your spell vamp. Alternatively, you can replace Thrill with Agility for better mobility, or Firmness for additional physical and magic defense if you want to be more durable. Complete your emblem set with Brave Smite. Brave Smite periodically restores a percentage of your max health when you deal skill damage, further boosting your sustainability in team fights.

equips.equip_desc: Start with the suitable type of Boots based on your opponent in the lane. Then, purchase War Axe to obtain Spell Vamp, Physical Attack, and Cooldown Reduction. However, if your lane enemy has HP regeneration capabilities, buy Dominance Ice. Next to War Axe, the best item for Terizla is Queens Wings. This equipment is a two-way item, providing both offense and defense. Transitioning to the mid to late game, purchase Oracle for better regeneration and Magic Defense, and invest in Immortality to increase your survivability.

hero.hero_overview: Terizla is a Fighter hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known for his tankiness and crowd control abilities. He excels in the EXP lane and is a strong front-line hero in team fights.
hero.hero_strength: His passive skill allows him to gain damage reduction the more health he loses, making him a solid frontline hero. Moreover, he can deal massive damage to enemies using his ultimate and other active abilities, while hindering their movement with multiple crowd control effects.
hero.hero_weakness: His slow skill animations, lack of mobility, and reliance on landing combos make him vulnerable to certain heroes and strategies.

spell.spell_desc: Since Terizla does not have reliable mobility skills, Flicker is the most suitable battle spell for him. Use it to close the gap against your enemies, or escape sticky situations. Furthermore, you can use it to make surprise initiations with your Penalty Zone, which is one of the most explosive Flicker ultimate combos in the game.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Since terizla is a setter he combos with tigreal or any tank setters since both are a good setter this combo will easily wipe out the enemy if they get caught. Always be ready to engage with the ally tank setter

counters.counter_desc: Terizla is a great counter to a squishy hero who doesn't have a mobility skill since terizla can stun or deal alot of damage to the squishy hero. So always target the squishy heros if you have an opportunity.

dominants.dominant_desc: In lane you have to know if you can fight head on the enemy laner if you can keep poking the enemy using terizlas skill that way the enemy laner will have a hard time. If not don't fight him head on just keep last hitting the minions that way you can level up quickly, once you hit level 4 always help the jungler in the turtle. Always zone the enemy jungler so that the ally jungler can secure the turtle. The turtle is a big help for the team.

emblems.emblem_desc: So that TERIZLA can survive in team fights and sustainability so he can fight his enemy laner.

equips.equip_desc: So that TERIZLA can survive and have a huge damage, also the last item depends on the enemy lane up. And the sky piercer isn't really necessary only use it if your winning in your lane but if not you can change it with a defence item that counters the enemy lane up.

hero.hero_strength: This hero is very strong at the early game and very good at the mid to late game, also this hero has very fast clearing minion waves thanks to his AOE/CC skills that way he can Cut lane very fast so that he can rotate to help teammates,also this hero serve as a secondary tank thanks to his CC ultimate he can set up the enemies and also master the flicker + ultimate combo then you can dominate the game.make sure to master the basic of this hero then you can easily win.
hero.hero_weakness: This hero is very slow since he doesn't have a movement skill and that's why sometimes you have to use your flicker to escape or engage, and his second skill is very slow.

data.recommend: For the people who wants a strong EXP laner

spell.spell_desc: So that TERIZLA has an escape or engage spell since he doesn't have a movement skill/very slow. And pairing this wihh his ultimate can chase enemies that tried to escape or just to engage with it. Master the ulti+flicker combo then you can easily dominate the game.

data.title: MY TERIZLA  BUILD

cooperates.cooperate_desc: terizla dan tigreal adalah gabungan yang terbaik karena ulti mereka dapat membuat montage untuk tim

counters.counter_desc: yu Zhong adalah hero yang memiliki pasif jika menghit musuh maka ada bar di bawah kaki jika bar sudah sampai full maka sepersen hero lawan akan di ambil terizla dan ini membuat terizla susah untuk 1v1 dengan yu Zhong juga karena skill 3 nya yang bisa membuat crowd control

dominants.dominant_desc: trik untuk terizla buatlah sepatu terlebih dahulu untuk movement speed terizla lalu di lanjut dengan membuat war axe untuk Lifesteal lalu buat lah Oracle untuk tambahan Lifesteal selanjutnya buat dominance ice untuk melawan hero hero dengan attack speed yang cepat seperti miya, layla, bruno setelah itu buatlah immortal agar tetap bertahan jika ada war yang terjadi

emblems.emblem_desc: Emblem brave smite dapat memberikan Lifesteal kepada lawan, festival of blood bagus untuk terizla karena jika terizla membunuh musuh atau lawan mendapatkan beberapa darah untuk diri nya sendiri, agility emblem ini bagus untuk terizla berpergian kemana saja karena menambah 4% movement ability

equips.equip_desc: Equipment ini dapat meningkatkan Lifesteal dan damage yang cukup hebat kepada lawan

hero.hero_overview: Terizla adalah hero dari organisasi Abby's yang juga bekerja bersama alice, dyrroth, thamuz, balmon
hero.hero_strength: Terima adalah hero yang mempunyai pasif ketika di hit oleh musuh maka akan meningkatkan maksimal 1% damage tambahan kepada diri sendiri
hero.hero_weakness: kelemahan Terizla adalah ika ada musuh cc(crowd control) membuat terizla tidak dapat menggunakan skill nya untuk memberikan damage kepada lawan

spell.spell_desc: Spell fliker adalah spell yang bagus untuk terizla karena dapat digabungkan dengan ultinya (penalty zone)

cooperates.cooperate_desc: With atlas ultimate, you can use your ultimate at the same time, making it harder for enemies to run away.
This combo only works if gatokaca hits enemy with its ultimate. Or you can just go for terizla ultimate then gatokaca ultimate which is way better.

counters.counter_desc: Alpha with its true damage can kill tanks. If alpha makes a level difference between you, he can easily ******** with his combo.
Xborg is a counter for most tank heroes since his first skill and ultimate does true damage. Its quite challenging to kill him even during ganking. So its difficult to get level difference with him.

dominants.dominant_desc: After reaching level 4 just help your hyper to secure the turtle. Initiate the team fight at the turtle. After securing the turtle head back to your lane.

Just after buying the war axe then an hunter strike, u will be doing a tons of damage from your skill 2. In this stage you can either combo your ultimate with your tank or be the initiator of team fights .

In late game, you are punching a 2k damage from just phase 1 of your skill 2. The spell vamp is too good which makes you more sustain. Try flicker ultimate combo to lock onto enemy mage or mm (cause late game mm and mage hit hard)

emblems.emblem_desc: For good spell vamp and good damage.

equips.equip_desc: Demon boots for early mana regeneration (u can swap it with tough boots in mid game) , war axe for spell vamp, hunter strike for physical penetration, blade of despair for extra physical attack, demon wings to keep sustain and immortality for saving yourself.

hero.hero_overview: Terizla is a strong fighter and dominates almost most exp heroes. It is strong till early-late. He is also used as a roamer to initiate fights.  But today we gonna make it a damage and spell vamp hero.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker and ultimate of Terizla pair perfectly. Flicker is essential for initiating fight or even escaping out of the fight. Use your flicker wisely.
